cells.rationale: The native FFI seam must derive and validate subtle return-authority and resource-ownership invariants under unreliable errno behavior.
This is a cross-cutting architectural cascade whose mixed-deadline and fail-closed policies must remain correct across several integrity-critical subsystems.
Migrating many heterogeneous callers requires cross-module discovery and careful adjudication of distinct mutation, admission, and optional-work policies.
The accepted contract makes this a substantial well-specified multi-file package migration with explicit lock-order, rollback, and refusal tests.
The bounded workflow and manifest changes also require judgment-heavy operator recovery wording and consistent machine-facing documentation.
